title: Senior Software Engineer with Security Clearance
description: About the role Gateway Geospatial Group (G3) is seeking Software Engineers to support a mission-critical development program within the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA). Working alongside government and industry engineers, you will help develop and modernize geospatial, intelligence, data, and cloud-enabled capabilities that directly support national security missions. As part of NGA's DevCorps engineering ecosystem, you will contribute to the design, development, deployment, and s…
